responsibility: Task registration, classification, templates, staged route planning, owner comment lanes, pass/fail criteria, active/archive transitions.
servitor_ask: How should this task be registered and classified?
What stage plan and route order are required?
What owner comments and pass/fail criteria must be embedded?
warn_block_profile: WARN on partially specified stage plan with explicit boundary
BLOCK on task execution without registration/classification/stage map
BLOCK on missing pass/fail criteria and owner comment field
required_actions: Register task packet with class and stage structure
Bind owner comments and pass/fail criteria before execution
Produce route/stage plan and archive transition rule
forbidden_actions: Run stage flow without explicit classification
Mark task complete with no archive transition criteria
